lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰਵਨੀ ਸੁਨਉ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰੇ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: sravanee sunau har har hare tthaakur jas gaavau |
lines.english: With my ears, I listen to the Lord, Har, Har; I sing the Praises of my Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਚਰਣ ਕਰ ਸੀਸੁ ਧਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਵਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sant charan kar sees dhar har naam dhiaavau |1|
lines.english: I place my hands and my head upon the feet of the Saints, and meditate on the Lord's Name. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਦਇਆਲ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਇਹ ਨਿਧਿ ਸਿਧਿ ਪਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa deaal prabh ih nidh sidh paavau |
lines.english: Be kind to me, O Merciful God, and bless me with this wealth and success.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਕੀ ਰੇਣੁਕਾ ਲੈ ਮਾਥੈ ਲਾਵਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sant janaa kee renukaa lai maathai laavau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Obtaining the dust of the feet of the Saints, I apply it to my forehead. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੀਚ ਤੇ ਨੀਚੁ ਅਤਿ ਨੀਚੁ ਹੋਇ ਕਰਿ ਬਿਨਉ ਬੁਲਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: neech te neech at neech hoe kar binau bulaavau |
lines.english: I am the lowest of the low, absolutely the lowest; I offer my humble prayer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਨਹ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਅਨ ਕਤਹਿ ਨ ਧਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: saas saas neh veesarai an kateh na dhaavau |
lines.english: With each and every breath, I never forget the Lord; I never go to another.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਵ ਮਲੋਵਾ ਆਪੁ ਤਿਆਗਿ ਸੰਤਸੰਗਿ ਸਮਾਵਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: paav malovaa aap tiaag santasang samaavau |2|
lines.english: I wash their feet, and renounce my self-conceit; I merge in the Saints' Congregation. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤੁ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਦਇਆ ਧਰਮੁ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਬਨਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: sat santokh deaa dharam seegaar banaavau |
lines.english: I am embellished with truth, contentment, compassion and Dharmic faith.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲ ਦਰਸਨ ਗੁਰੁ ਭੇਟੀਐ ਮਾਨੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਮਿਟਾਵਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: safal darasan gur bhetteeai maan mohu mittaavau |3|
lines.english: Obtaining the Fruitful Vision of the Guru's Darshan, I discard my pride and attachment. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਫਲ ਸੁਹਾਗਣਿ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਵਉ ॥੪॥੧੫॥੪੫॥
lines.translit: safal suhaagan naanakaa apune prabh bhaavau |4|15|45|
lines.english: My spiritual marriage is fruitful, O Nanak; I am pleasing to my God. ||4||15||45||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਜਨ ਹੋਆ ਸਾਧਸੰਗੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਭੇਟੈ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jis jan hoaa saadhasang tis bhettai har raaeaa |1|
lines.english: That humble being, who joins the Saadh Sangat, meets the Sovereign Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਟਲ ਬਚਨ ਸਾਧੂ ਜਨਾ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਗਟਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: attal bachan saadhoo janaa sabh meh pragattaaeaa |
lines.english: The words of the Holy are eternal and unchanging; this is apparent to everyone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਬਾਤਾ ਸਭਿ ਕਰਿ ਰਹੇ ਗੁਰੁ ਘਰਿ ਲੈ ਆਇਆ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: anik baataa sabh kar rahe gur ghar lai aaeaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Everyone is speaking in various ways, but the Guru has brought the Lord into the home of my self. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਪਰਤੀਤਿ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਕੀ ਜਪਿ ਹਰਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: eih parateet govind kee jap har sukh paaeaa |
lines.english: This faith in the Lord of the Universe, and peace, are found by meditating on the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮ ਭੂਮਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਬੋਇ ਅਉਸਰੁ ਦੁਲਭਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: karam bhoom har naam boe aausar dulabhaaeaa |2|
lines.english: In the field of actions and karma, plant the Lord's Name; this opportunity is so difficult to obtain! ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਣਿ ਪਰੇ ਕੀ ਰਾਖਤਾ ਨਾਹੀ ਸਹਸਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: saran pare kee raakhataa naahee sahasaaeaa |
lines.english: He preserves the honor of those who seek His Sanctuary; there is no doubt about this at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਪੁਨੀਤ ਘਣੇ ਕਰੇ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਬਿਰਦਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: patit puneet ghane kare tthaakur biradaaeaa |3|
lines.english: He purifies so many sinners; this is the natural way of our Lord and Master. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਆਪਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਭ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: antarajaamee aap prabh sabh kare karaaeaa |
lines.english: God Himself is the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts; He does, and causes everything to be done.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤ ਭੂਲਹੁ ਮਾਨੁਖ ਜਨ ਮਾਇਆ ਭਰਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: mat bhoolahu maanukh jan maaeaa bharamaaeaa |
lines.english: Don't be fooled, O mortal being, by the illusion of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਪਤਿ ਰਾਖਸੀ ਜੋ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਪਹਿਰਾਇਆ ॥੪॥੧੬॥੪੬॥
lines.translit: naanak tis pat raakhasee jo prabh pahiraaeaa |4|16|46|
lines.english: O Nanak, God saves the honor of those of whom He approves. ||4||16||46||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਟੀ ਤੇ ਜਿਨਿ ਸਾਜਿਆ ਕਰਿ ਦੁਰਲਭ ਦੇਹ ॥
lines.translit: maattee te jin saajiaa kar duralabh deh |
lines.english: He fashioned you from clay, and made your priceless body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਬਿਸਰੈ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਮਨੈ ਤੇ ਜਿਸ ਕੇ ਗੁਣ ਏਹ ॥
lines.translit: kiau bisarai prabh manai te jis ke gun eh |
lines.english: So why do you forget God from your mind? He has done so many good things for you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਛਿਦ੍ਰ ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਢਕੇ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟੇਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anik chhidr man meh dtake niramal drisatteh |1|
lines.english: He covers the many faults in your mind, and makes you look immaculate and pure. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤਜਿ ਰਚੇ ਜਿ ਆਨ ਸਿਉ ਸੋ ਰਲੀਐ ਖੇਹ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: prabh taj rache ji aan siau so raleeai kheh |1| rahaau |
lines.english: One who forsakes God, and blends himself with another, in the end is blended with dust. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮਰਹੁ ਸਿਮਰਹੁ ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਮਤ ਬਿਲਮ ਕਰੇਹ ॥
lines.translit: simarahu simarahu saas saas mat bilam kareh |
lines.english: Meditate, meditate in remembrance with each and every breath - do not delay!

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੋਡਿ ਪ੍ਰਪੰਚੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਿਉ ਰਚਹੁ ਤਜਿ ਕੂੜੇ ਨੇਹ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: chhodd prapanch prabh siau rachahu taj koorre neh |2|
lines.english: Renounce worldly affairs, and merge yourself into God; forsake false loves. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਅਨਿਕ ਏਕ ਬਹੁ ਰੰਗ ਕੀਏ ਹੈ ਹੋਸੀ ਏਹ ॥
lines.translit: jin anik ek bahu rang kee hai hosee eh |
lines.english: He is many, and He is One; He takes part in the many plays. This is as He is, and shall be.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚੇ ਤੇ ਊਚਾ ਵਡਾ ਸਭ ਸੰਗਿ ਬਰਨੇਹ ॥
lines.translit: aooche te aoochaa vaddaa sabh sang baraneh |
lines.english: God is said to be the highest of the high, the greatest of all, our companion.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਮਤਿ ਲੇਹ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kar sevaa tis paarabraham gur te mat leh |3|
lines.english: So serve that Supreme Lord God, and accept the Guru's Teachings. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਟੇਕ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਕੀ ਤਿਆਗੀ ਅਨ ਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: ek ttek govind kee tiaagee an aas |
lines.english: The Lord of the Universe is my only Support. I have renounced all other hopes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਸ ਦਾਸ ਕੋ ਦਾਸਰਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਿ ਲੇਹ ॥੪॥੧੭॥੪੭॥
lines.translit: daas daas ko daasaraa naanak kar leh |4|17|47|
lines.english: Please, let Nanak be the slave of the slave of Your slaves. ||4||17||47||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਊਪਰਿ ਸਮਰਥ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪੂਰਨ ਗੁਣਤਾਸ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sabh aoopar samarath prabh pooran gunataas |1|
lines.english: God is All-powerful, above all; He is the perfect treasure of virtue. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ਹੈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਣੀ ਪਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: jan kaa naam adhaar hai prabh saranee paeh |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is the Support of the humble servant who seeks God's Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਮੇਸਰ ਕਾ ਆਸਰਾ ਸੰਤਨ ਮਨ ਮਾਹਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: paramesar kaa aasaraa santan man maeh |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In their minds, the Saints take the Support of the Transcendent Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਰਖੈ ਆਪਿ ਦੇਵਸੀ ਆਪੇ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: aap rakhai aap devasee aape pratipaarai |
lines.english: He Himself preserves, and He Himself gives. He Himself cherishes.
